scripts.build: rm -rf dist public && tsc && mkdir -p dist/app/web dist/prompts/examples dist/knowledge/tpg dist/knowledge/schemas dist/data/test-inputs dist/data/test-outputs public/app/web && cp app/web/index.html dist/app/web/index.html && cp app/web/styles.css dist/app/web/styles.css && cp app/web/ai-logo.png dist/app/web/ai-logo.png && cp app/web/index.html public/index.html && cp app/web/index.html public/app/web/index.html && cp app/web/styles.css public/app/web/styles.css && cp app/web/ai-logo.png public/app/web/ai-logo.png && cp dist/app/web/app.js public/app/web/app.js && cp prompts/system.txt dist/prompts/system.txt && cp prompts/client-prep-template.md dist/prompts/client-prep-template.md && cp prompts/examples/bridges.md dist/prompts/examples/bridges.md && cp prompts/examples/titan.md dist/prompts/examples/titan.md && cp knowledge/tpg/practice-summary.json dist/knowledge/tpg/practice-summary.json && cp knowledge/tpg/project-types-short.json dist/knowledge/tpg/project-types-short.json && cp knowledge/tpg/fit-rules.json dist/knowledge/tpg/fit-rules.json && cp knowledge/schemas/research-packet.schema.json dist/knowledge/schemas/research-packet.schema.json && cp data/test-inputs/bridges.json dist/data/test-inputs/bridges.json && cp data/test-outputs/bridges-output.md dist/data/test-outputs/bridges-output.md
